title: glyceria lithuanica subsp. orientalis
intro: Glyceria lithuanica subsp. orientalis is a subspecies of the Glyceria lithuanica plant, a perennial aquatic grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Glyceria lithuanica subsp. orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
